settings.heading: Chew time for every dog in the house.
settings.subheading: Stock a cleaner, longer-lasting chew routine for households with more than one chewing style.
settings.problem_heading: Multiple dogs means multiple chew needs.
settings.problem_text: One dog finishes fast, another chews slowly, and the household goes through treats faster than expected.
settings.solution_heading: Build a stocked routine around durable yak chews.
settings.solution_text: Prime Pet Food makes it easier to keep simple-ingredient chews on hand for different dogs and chewing styles.
settings.review_2: Both dogs stay busy, and we buy fewer random treats.
settings.review_3: Bulk chews made our routine easier.
settings.product_text: A better fit for multi-dog homes that need reliable, longer-lasting chew options.
settings.bullet_3: Use different sizes for different dogs
settings.final_heading: Make chew time easier for the whole house.
settings.final_text: Stock up on premium yak cheese dog chews.
